headline: Synopsys Announces Availability of the First Wave of Multiphysics Fusion Solutions
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS) today announced availability of its first Multiphysics Fusion™ solutions for customer deployment. As chip complexity increases, physics-related challenges including signal integrity, power integrity, thermal integrity, electromagnetic effects, and co-packaged optics are becoming critical constraints at advanced nodes and in multi-die architectures, requiring a unified EDA and multiphysics approach. The Multiphysics Fusion portfolio combines Synopsys' AI-powered EDA

content.title: Synopsys Announces Availability of the First Wave of Multiphysics Fusion Solutions
content.summary: Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS) today announced availability of its first Multiphysics Fusion™ solutions for customer deployment. As chip complexity increases, physics-related challenges including signal integrity, power integrity, thermal integrity, electromagnetic effects, and co-packaged optics are becoming critical constraints at advanced nodes and in multi-die architectures, requiring a unified EDA and multiphysics approach. The Multiphysics Fusion portfolio combines Synopsys' AI-powered EDA
